trait.description: Average weekly beer plus cider intake
trait.confidence_notes: No genome-wide significant chrX loci in current build. GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Lifestyle and environment > Alcohol
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "In an average WEEK, how many pints of beer or cider would you drink? (Include bitter, lager, stout, ale, Guinness)"  The following checks were performed:    If answer    If answer > 250 then rejected   If answer > 100 then participant asked to confirm     ~F1588~ was collected from participants who indicated they drink alcohol more often than one to three times per month, as defined by their answers to ~F1558~
